title: Grace Mulvey Work In Progress Show
description: New work in progress show from BBC Galton & Simpson comedy winner Grace Mulvey, an Irish stand-up taking the UK comedy scene by storm. Co-host of the Fad Camp podcast (Irish Podcast Awards - Best Entertainment Podcast 2023), her debut show "Tall Baby" was named one of Rolling Stone magazine's "12 stand-out shows of the Edinburgh Fringe 2024". A finalist in the Vodafone Irish Comedian of the Year 2017 and in the international ISA TV Pilot, as well as Funny Women's Ones to Watch 2019. "The kind of stand-up that offers everyone in the room an hour of guaranteed floor-to-ceiling laughs" ★★★★ Beyond The Joke "... a sharply penned comedy hour... " ★★★★ The List
